metadata.description: Azure region for all resources. Default: Sweden Central (EU residency).
Short location token used in resource names.
Workload token used in resource + resource-group names.
Environment token used in resource names and tags.
Cost center tag value.
Azure OpenAI / Foundry model deployments to create on the AI Foundry account.
Azure AI Search SKU.
Storage SKU for the ADLS Gen2 deal-estate landing account.
Cosmos SQL database name (kept as the app default for data compatibility).
Deploy a Microsoft Fabric capacity. Requires at least one Fabric admin member.
Fabric capacity SKU (F-series).
Fabric capacity administrators (UPNs or object IDs). Required if deployFabric is true.
Deploy Azure API Management as the AI Gateway (Developer SKU ~ 30-45 min to provision).
API Management SKU.
API Management publisher email.
API Management publisher organization name.
Container image for the shared-backend orchestrator Container App.
Port the orchestrator container listens on (the Deal Room app uses 8080).
Deploy the Teams-interface Container App (enable once the teams-app image exists).
Container image for the Teams-interface Container App.
Port the Teams-interface container listens on.
Orchestrator replica floor/ceiling. Keep both = 1: the shared backend holds the M365 delegated token in-memory and a single writer avoids datastore races.
Entra app (client) ID for the Teams tab SSO (access_as_user). Empty disables per-user SSO.
Client secret for the Teams tab SSO app registration.
Deploy an Azure Bot registration for the in-channel conversational bot (requires botAppId + deployTeamsApp).
Entra app (client) ID / MSA App ID backing the Teams bot. Empty disables the bot.
Client secret for the Teams bot app registration.
Bot app type.
Entra object IDs (users or groups) granted the PARTNER role (full access + write).
Entra object IDs (users or groups) granted the DEAL-TEAM role (stage-2 + write).
Entra object IDs (users or groups) granted the ANALYST role (stage-1, read-only).
Role applied to callers not listed in any role array.
Shared secret proving Teams->orchestrator server calls (per-user identity + OBO Graph token). Empty = auto-derived stable per-deployment value.
Model deployment name the orchestrator app calls for chat/agents.
Name of the Foundry "Deal Room Analyst" agent (all-deals access, per-deal scoping).
Tenant used to build deal SharePoint/Teams deep links (<tenant>.sharepoint.com).
Entra tenant ID that gates the Deal MCP server (/mcp). Empty leaves /mcp fail-closed (503).
Accepted audiences for the Deal MCP server bearer token (comma-separated: client ID and/or api:// URI).
Optional delegated scope / app role the MCP token must carry (e.g. deals.read). Empty = audience+tenant only.
Entra app (client) ID for the in-app M365 delegated login. Empty disables the M365 connector.
Entra tenant ID for the M365 delegated login (defaults to entraTenantId when set).
Client secret for the M365 delegated login app registration.
Static read-only key for the /mcp read-only surface, used by Foundry-hosted (Teams) agents. Empty disables the key path (Entra still works).
Bind the market-intelligence layer to a live Microsoft Fabric lakehouse (external workspace).
Optional pinned parent Teams team ID that holds one channel per deal. Empty = find/create "The Deal Room".
Tenant-specific Teams app catalog id (org-catalog teamsApp) used to install the Deal Dashboard app + bot into deal teams. Empty skips the app install (non-fatal).
Entra/M365 group whose members every deal channel is auto-published to.
Container Registry SKU.
Lock data-plane services behind Private Endpoints and disable public network access.
Enable Key Vault purge protection (recommended for prod; blocks immediate redeploys of the same name).

resources.name: [guid(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', format('kv-{0}-{1}-{2}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName'), parameters('suffix'))), resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', format('id-{0}', parameters('namePrefix'))), variables('keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId'))]

metadata.description: Principal ID of the core UAMI granted data-plane access to the AI services.

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', format('aif-{0}-{1}-{2}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName'), parameters('suffix')), format('proj-{0}-{1}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName')))]

properties.description: Hosts the Deal Orchestrator and specialist deal-flow agents.

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', format('aif-{0}-{1}-{2}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName'), parameters('suffix')), format('proj-{0}-{1}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName')), 'bingGrounding')]
dependsOn: [resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/projects', format('aif-{0}-{1}-{2}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName'), parameters('suffix')), format('proj-{0}-{1}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName')))]

bingConnectionId.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/projects/connections', format('aif-{0}-{1}-{2}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName'), parameters('suffix')), format('proj-{0}-{1}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName')), 'bingGrounding')]

metadata.description: Cosmos SQL database name. Defaults to dealroom for data compatibility with existing app defaults.
Principal ID of the core UAMI granted data-plane access to storage + Cosmos.

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', format('cosmos-{0}-{1}-{2}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName'), parameters('suffix')), parameters('cosmosDatabaseName'), variables('appContainers')[copyIndex()])]

[format('{0}/{1}', format('cosmos-{0}-{1}-{2}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName'), parameters('suffix')), guid(resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', format('cosmos-{0}-{1}-{2}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName'), parameters('suffix'))), parameters('uamiPrincipalId'), variables('cosmosDataContributorRoleId')))]

metadata.description: Principal ID of the core UAMI granted data-plane access to Service Bus.

resources.name: [guid(resourceId('Microsoft.ServiceBus/namespaces', format('sb-{0}-{1}-{2}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName'), parameters('suffix'))), parameters('uamiPrincipalId'), variables('serviceBusDataOwnerRoleId'))]

metadata.description: Tenant-specific Teams app catalog id (org-catalog teamsApp) used to install the Deal Dashboard app + bot into deal teams. Empty skips the app install (non-fatal).
Entra/M365 group whose members every deal channel is auto-published to.
Deploy the Teams-interface Container App (forwards to the shared backend). Enabled in the Teams phase once the teams-app image exists.
Container image for the Teams-interface Container App.
Port the Teams-interface container listens on.
Orchestrator replica floor. Keep 1: the shared backend holds the M365 delegated token in-memory and a single writer avoids datastore races.
Orchestrator replica ceiling. Keep equal to the floor (1) unless you have externalised the M365 token and validated multi-writer behaviour.
Entra app (client) ID for the Teams tab SSO (access_as_user). Empty disables per-user SSO.
Client secret for the Teams tab SSO app registration.
Deploy an Azure Bot registration for the in-channel conversational bot (requires botAppId + deployTeamsApp).
Entra app (client) ID / MSA App ID backing the Teams bot. Empty disables the bot.
Client secret for the Teams bot app registration.
Bot app type.
Identity-aware RBAC (prefab roles) — Entra object IDs (users/groups) per role.
Shared Teams->orchestrator secret (per-user identity + OBO Graph token). Empty = auto-derived.

resources.name: [guid(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', format('acr{0}{1}{2}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName'), parameters('suffix'))), parameters('uamiPrincipalId'), variables('roleIds').acrPull)]

[guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', format('st{0}fn{1}{2}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName'), parameters('suffix'))), resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', format('func-{0}-events-{1}-{2}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName'), parameters('suffix'))), variables('roleIds').storageBlobDataOwner)]

botName.value: [if(and(and(parameters('deployBot'), not(empty(parameters('botAppId')))), parameters('deployTeamsApp')), format('bot-{0}-{1}-{2}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environmentName'), parameters('suffix')), 'not-deployed')]
